step_rationale: Cleaved from endothelium; reflects endothelial dysfunction and activation during ACS.
mechanism: sAPP770 is released from activated endothelium during acute coronary syndromes, reflecting endothelial injury and dysfunction.

references.title: Soluble amyloid precursor protein 770 is a novel biomarker candidate for acute coronary syndrome.
Soluble amyloid precursor protein 770 is released from inflamed endothelial cells and activated platelets: a novel biomarker for acute coronary syndrome.
